hooks.command: node -e "const f = (process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH || process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH || ''); const blocked = f.includes('.env') || (f.includes('supabase/migrations') && !f.includes('_new')); if (blocked) { console.error('BLOCKED: Direct edits to .env or existing migration files are protected. Create a new migration file instead.'); process.exit(2); }"

node -e "const f = (process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH || process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH || ''); const shouldCheck = f.includes('/actions/') || f.includes('/validations/') || f.includes('/types/domain') || f.includes('/lib/constants/') || f.includes('/lib/utils/audit'); if (shouldCheck) { const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { const out = execSync('NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=8192" npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1', { cwd: 'd:\.code\wattleos', timeout: 120000 }).toString(); if (out.trim()) { console.log('
[tsc] Type errors detected:
' + out.split('
').slice(-30).join('
')); } else { console.log('[tsc] Clean'); } } catch(e) { const lines = (e.stdout || '').toString().split('
'); console.log('
[tsc] Errors:
' + lines.slice(-30).join('
')); } }"
